groups.theme: Emotional support, anxiety relief, and mental health recovery
example_reviews: A fantastic app! Truly very helpful by supporting one to work through problems and find solutions.
step by step gentle clear assistance
very affective and actually free unlike other apps!!!! I love it!!!!
Absolutely amazing stuff. The CBT tool is super helpful for dealing with inner conflict. I have only used the app for 5 mins so far and felt an immediate impact. Highly encourage others to try this
helpful for sad nus

groups.theme: CBT exercises, mindfulness tools, guided meditation, and self-improvement features
example_reviews: do not install this app if you are searching for something free because this is paid.
best app for depressed and confused people like me.😊
very easy to use and I like the way it responds to anything you ask. its a good sounding board for free.

So far not so great. it's redundant and repetitive. It's just talk therapy, asking the same questions over and over. where are the tools that lead to a solution? the self care tab won't even load and when I opened the app this morning it slowed down every other function on my phone.
Wysa is currently helping me through a tough situation at work and at home. Wysa may be rudimentary as far as mental health care goes, it is available 24/7 which really helps.

groups.theme: Chatbot intelligence, response relevance, personalization, and conversation memory
example_reviews: i don't like this app so much. it gets out of the topic. it doesn't really understand you, it's just there.
the worst. it got me feeling worse than ever.
what stupid app, can't enev go ahead the 1st page, it ask for referral link or code.. I don't have it. so it just closed app

This app makes me feel understood, guided, and helped throughout the conversation. The constant questions asked and personal questions about emotions were very well executed and enjoyed. 😌 I also now feel like a 1800's author version of Picasso. <3
it's helpful, even if just for gaining a different perspective, sometimes it's the little things that make a big difference.

groups.theme: Accessibility, multilingual support, and inclusive user experience needs
example_reviews: new to the app but after a quick chat about a negative thought I've come away feeling better.
actually helped me sort out a certain situation I had going on , actually LISTENS , gentle , and honest
it helped me a lot. suggest it, pretty straightforward not too much why and how's just help. worth it
I am slowly recovering from mental breakdown, but this app is really helpful. I am recommending those who have the same feeling as I had.
If you need a companion to help you to deal with your emotions daily, I highly recommend this app.

groups.theme: Subscription, premium features, and pricing concerns
example_reviews: feels like chatting to a customer support bot that was designed 5 years ago, not a proper llm

edit: I used to love this app then subscribed today. no meditations will work you can just simply push play on a mediation. this app sucks. instead of sleeping ive spent 30 min trying to get it to work and now im more awake I love this app, it is so helpful for anxiety and depression. It guides you through reframing your thoughts in an effective way. In the process I look at things more realistically instead of catastrophizing what happened.
This is helping me to relax and have a better attitude.
I was a little sceptical when I installed this. Surprisingly feeling better already after 30..ish mins using it. to be contd....
THIS HELPS SO MUCH IT HELPED WITH MY OVERTHINKING AND HELPED TO MAKE MY THOUGHTS POSITIVE. IF YOU'RE STRUGGLING PLSSSSSS DOWNLOAD THIS
